title: Kuro’s Plan Against Kaya Is Revealed
description: On pages 19–21, the Syrup Village story develops through Usopp, Kaya, Kuro, Jango, and the Straw Hats as the danger behind the village’s peaceful surface becomes clearer.
scene: This scene follows the tension around Usopp’s village: lies, loyalty, hidden plans, and the growing clash with the Black Cat Pirates.

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Will attack the village, when Dawn breaks!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: How can you still be alive?

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: He was asleep the whole time

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Captain! We heard about the pirates!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: We've got to warn every- one!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: How is it possible for me to believe you like this?

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Get him! Don't let him get away!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Just like all the other times, of course it was just a lie!

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: I was just having my revenge on that butler,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: By making up stories about him being a pirate!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Whattt!? It was just a lie?

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Man! I thought something big was going to happen!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp Pirate
dialogue.text: Even the straw- hat Nicholas helped captain usopp lie to us!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Captain shouldn't make up lies just because of this. That's not honor- able!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Yea, I feel the same way!

summary: The part advances the Syrup Village arc by tying Usopp’s reputation and Kaya’s safety to the threat posed by Kuro and his crew.
